title: Product Discovery Maturity
promise: Discovery maturity diagnostic for continuous contact, problem framing, experiment quality, and decision integration.
audience: Product teams, founders, UX researchers, designers, and product leaders
description: Team maturity assessment across Continuous Customer Contact, Problem Framing, Experiment Quality, Decision Integration. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate answer-support checks.
ogDescription: Discovery maturity diagnostic for continuous contact, problem framing, experiment quality, and decision integration.
